assertions.description: document.title is a string property — the source of the document title that PWA windows compose with the app name.
Assigning to document.title is observable — the round-trip works (the feature changes the composition, not the API).
<title> remains a known HTML element (the fix lives in the browser chrome, not the DOM).
<link rel=manifest> parses — PWA app titles come from the manifest's name + the document title.
navigator.getInstalledRelatedApps is exposed on PWA-capable UAs and is callable to test PWA-context behaviour.
